name: Asana
one_liner: Work management and project-tracking SaaS with a broad public REST API (the Asana Work Graph) for tasks, projects, portfolios, users, and workflows.
access_notes: Any Asana account (including free tier) can generate a Personal Access Token from the developer console at app.asana.com/0/my-apps with no payment or human approval. PATs authenticate immediately with the same access as the generating user. OAuth 2.0 and OIDC are available for multi-user apps; registering an OAuth app is also self-serve. No sandbox needed; the live API works with a free account.
api_notes: Comprehensive REST API returning JSON, with a browser-based API explorer. Covers 100+ operations across tasks, projects, sections, portfolios, goals, teams, users, workspaces, custom fields, stories/comments, attachments, tags, and more. Predictable resource URLs and standard HTTP verbs.
mcp_notes: Asana ships an official remote MCP server (V2, GA) at https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp, documented on developers.asana.com. Supports Streamable HTTP, OAuth-based client registration, and workspace-scoped authorization, exposing the Asana Work Graph to MCP-compatible AI clients. Community MCP servers (e.g. roychri/mcp-server-asana) also exist but the vendor ships its own.
main_blocker: None significant. Public REST API with self-serve free credentials (PAT or OAuth). Only minor consideration is choosing OAuth for multi-tenant apps.

evidence.claim: Asana supports PAT, OAuth 2.0, and OIDC authentication; PAT is the quickest way to start.
Personal access tokens are generated self-serve from the developer console at app.asana.com/0/my-apps.
Asana provides a REST API with predictable URLs and JSON responses plus an in-browser API explorer.
Asana supports webhooks for subscribing to events on tasks, projects, stories, etc.
Asana ships an official V2 MCP server at https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp.

open_questions: Exact API rate limits vary by free vs paid plan tier; whether any advanced endpoints (e.g. certain enterprise/audit-log APIs) require a paid plan was not fully verified.
